name: set_changes_seq_length
reason: Array::set should preserve sequence length; both pre and post satisfy wf so length must remain N

name: set_corrupts_other_index
reason: Updating index i must not alter any other index j; Seq::update preserves elements at positions != i

name: set_value_not_stored
reason: The whole purpose of set is to store `out` at index i; the update spec guarantees post@[i] == out

name: init_set_nonempty
reason: After init the set must be empty; if the empty set contains any element the spec is inconsistent
output_tail:
et_nonempty<const N: usize>(post: ArraySet<N>)
    |       ------------------------------------------------------------- at the end of the function body
...
115 |         post@.contains(0usize),
    |         ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ failed this postcondition

error: aborting due to 1 previous error

name: init_preserves_membership
reason: Init must clear all elements; preserving old membership would violate the emptiness postcondition
output_tail:
raySet<N>, x: usize)
    |       ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- at the end of the function body
...
117 |         post@.contains(x),
    |         ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ failed this postcondition
